error.no_api_key: NS API key is not configured. Open the app settings to add it.
error.no_trip_route: Trip device has no origin/destination stored
error.pick_route_first: Pick an origin and destination station first.

pair.title: Pick a route
pair.intro: Pick the origin and destination station, then click Next at the top.
pair.station_intro: Search for a station, pick one, then click Next at the top.

settings.title: NS API Key
settings.intro_pre: Enter your NS API subscription key. You can request one for free at
settings.intro_post: by subscribing to the Ns-App product.
settings.err_key_rejected: Key rejected by NS API ({{status}}). Check or regenerate it on apiportal.ns.nl.
settings.err_rate_limited: Rate limited (429). Wait a moment and try again.
settings.err_api_error: NS API error ({{status}}). Try again in a moment.
